d: Markdown-first portable memory protocol and starter toolkit for AI agents.
Protocol reference for preserving, organizing, searching, updating, and explaining durable memory.
Reference pattern for maintaining an LLM-generated wiki between raw sources and answers.
Compact agent entrypoint for everyday graph-first memory retrieval.
Optional Node tool for rotating logs, rebuilding archive indexes, and bounded synthesis.
Optional Node tool for validating, querying, indexing, and measuring graph JSONL memory.
Optional Node tool for anonymous read-volume and command-duration memory benchmarks.
Checks graph-first retrieval cost and expected node hits for agents without semantic memory search.
AI-first JSONL nodes, edges, aliases, and catalog for compact direct retrieval.
Compact chronological work log retained for markdown compatibility.
Durable facts and raw discoveries retained for markdown compatibility.
Guide for markdown-only PAM users adopting graph-v1 without losing portable markdown memory.
Upgrade guide for enabling file-only graph coverage without changing graph-v1 schema.
Runbooks should use MUST/DO NOT rules, quality gates, examples, and checkable completion criteria.
